testimonials.title: What Clubs Say About Us
testimonials.subtitle: See what our customers have to say about 4sports

items.text: I tracked attendance in a notebook for years. Now I check everyone off on my phone the moment they walk in. It just works.
Parents stopped calling me about every payment. They can see everything themselves in the app. That alone was worth it.
I was a bit skeptical at first. But the onboarding team was patient with us and within a few weeks everything was running smoothly.
As a parent, knowing when my son actually showed up to practice — without having to ask the coach — is genuinely useful.
I post the schedule once and kids see it in the app. No more messages in five different group chats at midnight.
I can track each athlete's development over time. It's made planning training sessions a lot more intentional.
Finally have income and expenses in one place. Before this I was piecing things together from messages and spreadsheets.
Sending a notification to all parents used to take a while. Now it's one tap and done. Simple things matter.
Honestly didn't think an app would change much. Turned out I was wrong. It actually saves me real time every week.

questions.question: How much does 4sports cost?
questions.answer: Pricing depends on the number of members in your club. Contact us for a quote.

questions.question: Is there a free trial?
questions.answer: Yes! We offer a 30-day free trial with full access to all features.

questions.question: How long does setup take?
questions.answer: Most clubs are up and running within 24 hours. Our team provides full onboarding support.

questions.question: Is my data secure?
questions.answer: Absolutely. We use enterprise-grade security and comply with all data protection regulations.

section1.title: Information We Collect
section1.content: We collect information you provide directly to us when using 4sports, including your name, email address, phone number, and club-related data. This information is necessary to provide our sports club management services and communicate with you effectively.

section2.title: How We Use Your Information
section2.content: We use the information we collect to operate and improve 4sports, provide customer support, send you updates about our service, and ensure the security of your data. We never sell your personal information to third parties.

section3.title: Data Security
section3.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We regularly update our security practices to ensure your information remains safe and secure.

section4.title: Your Rights
section4.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can also request a copy of your data or restrict its processing. Contact our support team to exercise these rights.

section5.title: Contact Us
section5.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us at privacy@4sports.com or through our contact form.

section1.title: Agreement to Terms
section1.content: By accessing and using 4sports, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time.

section2.title: Service Description
section2.content: 4sports provides a comprehensive sports club management platform including member management, attendance tracking, payment processing, and communication tools. We strive to maintain service availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted access.

section3.title: User Responsibilities
section3.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to use 4sports only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms.

section4.title: Payment Terms
section4.content: Subscription fees are billed monthly or annually as selected. All fees are non-refundable except as required by law. We reserve the right to modify pricing with 30 days notice to existing customers.

section5.title: Limitation of Liability
section5.content: 4sports is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service. Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid in the last 12 months.

support.title: Support
support.description: How can we help you? Choose a request type and describe your issue.
support.deleteWarningText: Requesting account deletion will permanently remove all your data including profile information, activity history, and any associated content. This action cannot be undone. Please make sure to include the email address associated with your account.
